domain_context.scoring_model: revenue recovered vs revenue at risk per vector

learned_insights.chargeback_pattern: Brands recover 8-12% of gross wholesale annually through systematic CB management vs 2-3% baseline.
learned_insights.size_curve_pattern: 40% of specialty doors are running size curves based on rep intuition, not POS data.
learned_insights.churn_pattern: Accounts silent 90+ days cancel at 3x base rate. 60-day intervention window is the leverage point.
learned_insights.dead_stock_pattern: Liquidation matching yields +119% recovery lift vs default markdown when destination is demand-matched.
learned_insights.po_timing_pattern: Factory on-time rate below 50% on <21 day window = CRITICAL; split shipment recovers avg 60% of exposure.

outcome_observer_ownership.owns: Closing the hive loop on pending directives
